languages.text: {n}Пылкую речь Эоганна можно принять за проявление гордыни и тщеславия. Но за ней кроется что-то иное — упрямство, рожденное из какого-то глубоко личного переживания. Этот человек носит на себе тяжкий груз и эксперимент — лишь одна из многочисленных попыток его снять.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Пылкую речь Эоганна можно принять за проявление гордыни и тщеславия. Но за ней кроется что-то иное — упрямство, рожденное из какого-то глубоко личного переживания. Этот человек носит на себе тяжкий груз и эксперимент — лишь одна из многочисленных попыток его снять.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

{n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオガンの熱弁は、傲慢さや自負に聞こえるかもしれない。しかし、その背後には、深い個人的な経験から生まれた頑固さがある。この男は重い荷を背負っている。そして、この実験は、その荷をようやく放つための試みの一つに過ぎない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: エゴンの熱弁は、傲慢さや自負に聞こえるかもしれない。しかし、その背後には、深い個人的な経験から生まれた頑固さがある。この男は重い荷を背負っている。そして、この実験は、その荷をようやく放つための試みの一つに過ぎない。

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡这番充满激情的言辞，极易被误认为傲慢与自负。但这背后还隐藏着其他东西，某种源自刻骨铭心的个人经历的执念。这个男人背负着沉重的负担，而这项实验，不过是他试图卸下重负的诸多尝试之一。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡这番充满激情的言辞，极易被误认为傲慢与自负。但这背后还隐藏着其他东西，某种源自刻骨铭心的个人经历的执念。这个男人背负着沉重的负担，而这项实验，不过是他试图卸下重负的诸多尝试之一。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El discurso apasionado de Eogunn podría confundirse con orgullo y vanidad, pero hay otra cosa tras sus palabras, una obstinación proveniente de algún tipo de experiencia muy personal. Este hombre porta una pesada carga, y el experimento no es más que otro de muchos intentos de librarse de ella.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El discurso apasionado de Eogunn podría confundirse con orgullo y vanidad, pero hay otra cosa tras sus palabras, una obstinación proveniente de algún tipo de experiencia muy personal. Este hombre porta una pesada carga, y el experimento no es más que otro de muchos intentos de librarse de ella.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunns leidenschaftliche Rede könnte als stolz und überheblich missverstanden werden. Aber da ist noch mehr, eine aus einer persönlichen Erfahrung geborene Verbissenheit. Dieser Mann trägt eine schwere Bürde, und das Experiment ist nur einer von vielen Versuchen, sich endlich von ihr zu befreien.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunns leidenschaftliche Rede könnte als stolz und überheblich missverstanden werden. Aber da ist noch mehr, eine aus einer persönlichen Erfahrung geborene Verbissenheit. Dieser Mann trägt eine schwere Bürde, und das Experiment ist nur einer von vielen Versuchen, sich endlich von ihr zu befreien.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Derrière la fierté et la vanité que semble exprimer le discours passionné d'Eogunn, on peut déceler autre chose, une obstination née d'une expérience profondément personnelle. Cet homme porte un lourd fardeau et cette expérience n'est que l'une de ses nombreuses tentatives visant à s'en soulager enfin.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Derrière la fierté et la vanité que semble exprimer le discours passionné d'Eogunn, on peut déceler autre chose, une obstination née d'une expérience profondément personnelle. Cet homme porte un lourd fardeau et cette expérience n'est que l'une de ses nombreuses tentatives visant à s'en soulager enfin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un tutkulu konuşması, gururuna ve kibrine yorulabilir. Ancak bunun ardında başka bir şey yatıyor: Derinden gelen, şahsi bir deneyimin doğurduğu inatçılığı. Bu adam ağır bir yük taşıyor ve deney, ondan nihayet kurtulmak için yaptığı pek çok girişimden sadece biri.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's passionate speech could be mistaken for pride and conceit. But something else lies behind it, a doggedness born of some deeply personal experience. This man carries a heavy burden, and the experiment is but one of his many attempts to relieve himself of it at last.{/n}
